practice.label: ↳ The Approach
practice.text: I bring a design sensibility to project management — orchestrating teams, timelines, and creative vision into work that ships on time and feels right.

currently.label: ↳ Currently
currently.text: Leading two product launches and advising a cultural institution on their digital roadmap. Open to new collaborations starting this quarter.

about.label: ↳ About
about.text: I'm a project lead based in Mexico City who believes great work happens when strategy meets craft. Previously at Estudio Raíz and Ideame. Now independent, working with teams who care about how things get made.
